name: shared-api
description: Public-API key management — generate, list, revoke long-lived tokens that external clients (Hermes, OpenClaw, other yha instances) use to call this bridge. Adds the 'API' tab to the Preferences modal showing per-key labels, last-used timestamps, and per-model usage / cost totals. Bridge endpoints (/v1/api-keys/*) currently live in bridge/config/api-keys.ts (core); disabling this module only hides the prefs tab — existing tokens still validate until that handler moves into a bridge half.
